name: proc_creation_win_susp_obfuscated_ip_via_cli
raw_query: any where (process.executable like~ ("*\\ping.exe", "*\\arp.exe")) and ((process.command_line like~ ("* 0x*", "*//0x*", "*.0x*", "*.00x*")) or (process.command_line:"*http://%*" and process.command_line:"*%2e*") or (process.command_line like~ ("SigmaRegularExpression(regexp=SigmaString(['https', <SpecialChars.WILDCARD_SINGLE: 2>, '://[0-9]{1,3}\\.[0-9]{1,3}\\.0[0-9]{3,4}']), flags=set())", "SigmaRegularExpression(regexp=SigmaString(['https', <SpecialChars.WILDCARD_SINGLE: 2>, '://[0-9]{1,3}\\.0[0-9]{3,7}']), flags=set())", "SigmaRegularExpression(regexp=SigmaString(['https', <SpecialChars.WILDCARD_SINGLE: 2>, '://0[0-9]{3,11}']), flags=set())", "SigmaRegularExpression(regexp=SigmaString(['https', <SpecialChars.WILDCARD_SINGLE: 2>, '://(0[0-9]{1,11}\\.){3}0[0-9]{1,11}']), flags=set())", "SigmaRegularExpression(regexp=SigmaString(['https', <SpecialChars.WILDCARD_SINGLE: 2>, '://0[0-9]{1,11}']), flags=set())", "SigmaRegularExpression(regexp=SigmaString([' [0-7]{7,13}']), flags=set())"))) and (not process.command_line:"SigmaRegularExpression(regexp=SigmaString(['https', <SpecialChars.WILDCARD_SINGLE: 2>, '://((25[0-5]|(2[0-4]|1\\d|[1-9])', <SpecialChars.WILDCARD_SINGLE: 2>, '\\d)(\\.|\\b)){4}']), flags=set())")
